problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: If Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
